text: They approved it! Both boards voted yes to the Verona Platform joint venture!
And they named us co-leads! Romeo, we actually did it.
I hear you need a security lead for this new venture. I happen to be available.
Mercutio, you are hired. First order of business: security audit of the entire platform.
The cluster handled the live demo without a single hiccup. Congratulations, everyone.
Romeo, Juliet, I was wrong. The platform is the right move. I look forward to working together.
